run_command: set -a && [ -f ../../../.env ] && . ../../../.env || true; set +a; if [ -n "${OPENROUTER_API_KEY:-}" ] && [ -z "${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}" ]; then export OPENAI_API_KEY="$OPENROUTER_API_KEY"; fi; if [ -n "${OPENROUTER_BASE_URL:-}" ] && [ -z "${OPENAI_BASE_URL:-}" ]; then export OPENAI_BASE_URL="$OPENROUTER_BASE_URL"; fi; if [ -n "${OPENAI_API_BASE:-}" ] && [ -z "${OPENAI_BASE_URL:-}" ]; then export OPENAI_BASE_URL="$OPENAI_API_BASE"; fi; if [ -z "${OPENAI_BASE_URL:-}" ] && [ -n "${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}" ]; then export OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://api.openai.com/v1; fi; if [ -z "${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}" ]; then echo 'Missing OPENAI_API_KEY/OPENROUTER_API_KEY for LOCOMO run' >&2; exit 2; fi && ./setup_memory_core.sh && (./start_gateway.sh >/tmp/locomo_gateway.log 2>&1 &) && uv run python scripts/run_memory_core.py --input datasets/locomo10.json --limit 5 --gateway http://127.0.0.1:18789 --agent-model openai/gpt-4.1-mini --judge-model openai/gpt-4.1-mini --skip-ingest && latest=$(ls -td outputs/* 2>/dev/null | head -n1) && test -n "$latest" && cp "$latest/summary.json" /Users/markcastillo/git/eidolon-agent-memory/docs/evals/artifacts/locomo_20260418T214542Z.json
